focus_points: Review the bounded RR-AUTH-04 clean-baseline packet from a security perspective only.
Treat previously accepted RR-AUTH-04 debt items as expected-closed and re-raise them only if the new implementation or evidence still leaves a real blocker.
Focus on reset timing side channels, token lifecycle integrity, password-policy enforcement, route/middleware guardrail drift, and public abuse-control coverage.
Do not reopen unrelated auth redesign outside the frozen RR-AUTH-04 package.
For each material finding, include category and formalizable-hint when they can be judged honestly.
goal: Fresh RR-AUTH-04 security rerun after debt-elimination reopen. Determine whether any bounded security blocker still survives on this baseline. Findings first. JSON only.
